requiredFindings.statement: The provider calendar contains one unique dated G.5 release for every required pre-taper calendar month.
The dated legacy releases contain Broad and OITP components contemporaneously.
The methodology change became effective on 2019-02-04 and separates legacy Broad/OITP from redesigned Broad/AFE/EME.
The redesigned historical backcast is not treated as event-time history before its 2019 release.

evidenceItems.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
evidenceItems.assertion: The dated G.5 release for January 3, 2006 contains Broad, Major Currency, and OITP dollar index components.

evidenceItems.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
evidenceItems.assertion: The dated G.5 release for April 1, 2013 contains Broad, Major Currency, and OITP dollar index components.

evidenceItems.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
evidenceItems.assertion: The provider calendar exposes dated monthly G.5 releases used to verify unique calendar-month coverage.

evidenceItems.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
evidenceItems.assertion: The Federal Reserve methodology changes became effective on February 4, 2019; the new Broad/AFE/EME indexes include a backcast that must not be treated as event-time history before that release date.

counterEvidence.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
counterEvidence.summary: The redesigned indexes provide history before their 2019 effective date; that backcast is a current-methodology reconstruction and cannot be silently substituted for contemporaneously released legacy observations.

requiredFindings.statement: Every eligible QBP quarter requires provider-primary proof of its actual publication date.
Q3 2025 became eligible on 2025-11-24 before the research cutoff.
Q4 2025 was released on 2026-02-24 and is ineligible at the 2025-12-31 cutoff.
Forward-fill uses only the latest actually published QBP and carries explicit stale age.

evidenceItems.assertion: The FDIC states that the Quarterly Banking Profile is published about 55 days after quarter end, so quarter-end metadata cannot establish the actual publication date.
The FDIC released the Third Quarter 2025 Quarterly Banking Profile on November 24, 2025, before the 2025-12-31 research cutoff.
The FDIC released the Fourth Quarter 2025 Quarterly Banking Profile on February 24, 2026, after the 2025-12-31 research cutoff.

counterEvidence.summary: The Q4 2025 reporting period ended at the research cutoff, but the provider did not release the QBP until 2026-02-24; quarter-end therefore cannot establish event-time availability.
